sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Following #13601 Close #13680
Currently when --moe-runner-backend deep_gemm is applied, the accuracy will drop to 0 for any non-deepseek model. It's caused by the missing requantization process that converts weight/scale to ue8m0 format. This requantization is required for DeepGemm kernel

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Skip ray tests on ROCm
vllm.author: rjrock
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR skips tests with ray as the distributed executor backend on ROCm, in order to make the AMD run of the testgroup Distributed Tests (2 GPUs) slightly more successful.
Setting ray as data parallel backend in vLLM fails on ROCm due to how ray manages GPU resources, how vLLM allocates res

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix `plan` API Mismatch when using latest FlashInfer
vllm.author: askliar
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Latest FlashInfer (0.5.3) changes plan API which breaks fast_plan_decode.
This PR updates FlashInfer to the latest version and fixes API breaking by adding another argument to self._cached_module.plan call, corresponding to num_colocated_ctas=0.

vllm.title: [Feature][Bench] Add pareto visualization
vllm.author: lengrongfu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Current vllm bench sweep can running
The current vllm bench sweep test performs multiple rounds of testing and yields a solution. While vllm bench sweep plot can show the relationships between metrics, it cannot plot Pareto Optimality because it requires some metric manipulation.
The current
